Video.summary: Kendra is on a mission to save her from her toxic boyfriend Chris. At 17, Kendra is pregnant with his sixth child. Kendra has tried almost everything including kicking him out of their house, but he not only argued back but assaulted Kendra as well.
Video.title: My Boyfriend Beat Up My Mom

Image.alt: My Boyfriend Beat Up My Mom
My Boyfriend Beat Up My Mom
My Boyfriend Beat Up My Mom

Video.summary: Johnny's family hates his wife and his sister is here today to destroy his marriage. But, Johnny's wife isn't going quietly! Next Mitchell is here to confront his boyfriend about his boyfriend's decision to become a woman!
Video.title: The Springer Showdown

Video.summary: Bambi is a high-class call girl in the Los Angeles area who explains her life as a prostitute. Then Tiffany confronts their pimp C.T. about selling her for sex without her knowledge.
Video.title: High Class Call Girls

Video.summary: Khristal's significant other does not take kindly to Billy's advances; a secret revelation puts a kibosh on April's marriage; Meghan wants to reunite with her online boyfriend, who confesses to having had an affair.
Video.title: I Paid Your Girlfriend for Sex

Image.alt: I Paid Your Girlfriend for Sex
I Paid Your Girlfriend for Sex
I Paid Your Girlfriend for Sex

Video.summary: Tim doesn't know if he wants to be with Desiree, his wife and mother of his daughter, or Victoria his gorgeous coworker and Mistress. Then, Olivia is here because she's sick and tired of her husband Fred's cheating ways.
Video.title: Saucy Mistresses

Video.summary: A woman cheats with a little person she met at a chicken fight; a waffle waitress has an illicit affair with one of her customers.
Video.title: One Night Stands

Video.summary: Steven and Tekla say their daughter-in-law Jamie is their retirement fund. Then, Patricia will reveal to her mom who introduced her to hooking!
Video.title: I'm Pimping My Daughter

Video.summary: Jazzy wants a threesome with her best friend and her boyfriend; Danielle's baby daddy hooked up with her good friend; Marra's big secret explodes in his face.
Video.title: Love Predictions ... Threesomes

Video.summary: Kenny lived with sisters Lora and Misty, who are also his lovers but he treats them like servants. Later, Jerry confronts Kenny with the results of the 9 positive paternity tests, but Kenny says he only cares about 2 of his 9 children.
Video.title: Three Sisters Share A Man!

Video.summary: Mr. Panama is back and still cannot decide which girl he wants to be with. Next Chauntey is a transsexual who’s cheating with her lover's brother! Later Chris is back and he's still trying to play Dee and Rhonda at the same time.
Video.title: Unforgettable Guests Return

Video.summary: Audrina is prepared to get to the bottom of rumors that her boyfriend slept with her strip-club co-worker; Ashley's husband wants her permission to have sex with other women; Stephanie's revelation may ruin her bond with her newfound sister.
Video.title: Stripper Slapfest

Video.summary: Bonnie says she has been sleeping with her daughters girlfriend. Next, Akeem wants to confess to his girlfriend about his shocking affair. Then, Nick is ready to come clean about why he will only have sex with the lights off.
Video.title: Wicked Confessions

Video.summary: A scandal involves two cousins and their boyfriends; Hector wants to propose to his girlfriend, but must first come clean about something he did while he was on the road; Brittney wants to get romantic with a man who already has a girlfriend.
Video.title: The Fiesta Is Over

Video.summary: Edith says that as soon as her daughter's new boyfriend moved in, her wallet was stolen and a $600 check was forged; Tuyet was floored when her friend accused her of stealing $30,000 worth of jewelry from her bag.
Video.title: Did My Daughter and Her Boyfriend Steal From Me?

Image.alt: Did My Daughter and Her Boyfriend Steal From Me?
Did My Daughter and Her Boyfriend Steal From Me?
Did My Daughter and Her Boyfriend Steal From Me?

Video.summary: While Terrell's wife admits to chatting with other men online, she insists she never slept with any of them; Howard caught his girlfriend lying and wonders if she has been faithful; Devin constantly accuses his new wife of cheating.
Video.title: I Cheated In Front of My Wife...She Didn't Stop Me

Image.alt: I Cheated In Front of My Wife...She Didn't Stop Me
I Cheated In Front of My Wife...She Didn't Stop Me
I Cheated In Front of My Wife...She Didn't Stop Me

Video.summary: Bill is 15 and huffs gasoline every day in order to get high and refused to stop, despite a loving family that wants to see him well.
Video.title: My Grandson is Killing Himself

Video.summary: Jessie is done with her boyfriend Dakota’s name calling, stalking, and accusations and wants it to stop before she loses her job. Larynee thought her fiancé Steven was the one, but isn’t so sure now and suspects him of cheating on her!
Video.title: I'm a Prisoner in My Relationship

Image.alt: I'm a Prisoner in My Relationship
I'm a Prisoner in My Relationship
I'm a Prisoner in My Relationship

Video.summary: Tasha wants to prove to her ex boyfriend Martin that he's the father of her 4 year old daughter. Martin's sister says that she thinks the child might belong to her boyfriend Terrence because they had a threesome a year ago. Who's the real father?
Video.title: I Had a Threesome: Who's the Dad?

Image.alt: I Had a Threesome: Who's the Dad?
I Had a Threesome: Who's the Dad?
I Had a Threesome: Who's the Dad?

Video.summary: Evan says his girlfriend's sister made up the story that they had sex; Sarra's much-older husband accuses her of having sex with her own cousin.
Video.title: Your Sister Is Lying: We Never Had Sex!

Image.alt: Your Sister Is Lying: We Never Had Sex!
Your Sister Is Lying: We Never Had Sex!
Your Sister Is Lying: We Never Had Sex!

Video.summary: Lianna and Devone have been married for a year, but she suspects Devone of being unfaithful because he stays out all night and is rarely home. Then, Kya is out on a $50,000 bond for allegedly abusing her newborn son, but did she do it?
Video.title: Is Our Life Together a Lie?

Image.alt: Is Our Life Together a Lie?
Is Our Life Together a Lie?
Is Our Life Together a Lie?

Video.summary: Parents, Siblings, and Children meet their families for the first time.
Video.title: I Never Knew I Had a Family

Image.alt: I Never Knew I Had a Family
I Never Knew I Had a Family
I Never Knew I Had a Family

Video.summary: Secret crushes are revealed in this surprising and heart-warming episode.
Video.title: Secret Teen Crushes

Video.summary: Young teens say that they're suicidal because of all the abuse they've suffered at the hands of a bully who won't leave them alone.
Video.title: Tormented Teens Confront Their Bullies

Video.summary: Do you know what its like to go to the Boy Scouts and have them ask you where your father is?
Video.title: Help Me Prove He's My Daddy!

Image.alt: Help Me Prove He's My Daddy!
Help Me Prove He's My Daddy!
Help Me Prove He's My Daddy!

Video.summary: These couples are about to have a baby but someone has been sleeping around.
Video.title: I'm Pregnant, You Cheated . . .

Video.summary: Watch old lovers reunite after many years in this touching episode.
Video.title: True Love Surprise Reunions

Video.summary: Babies having babies. These mother's show concern for their underage pregnant daughters.
Video.title: I'm Only 12 . . . And Im Pregnant

Video.summary: Linda, once teased for being fat and geeky, transforms into a bombshell ready to confront her past.
Video.title: I Was a Blimp... Now I'm a Bombshell!

Image.alt: I Was a Blimp... Now I'm a Bombshell!
I Was a Blimp... Now I'm a Bombshell!
I Was a Blimp... Now I'm a Bombshell!

Video.summary: Actresses and Models appear on the show to express how the paparazzi and tabloids interfered with lies that affected their professional caress and personal lives.
Video.title: Tabloid Lies

Video.summary: Teenage girls do whatever they want at the expense of their mother's sanity.
Video.title: I Want to Divorce My Teen

Image.alt: I Want to Divorce My Teen
I Want to Divorce My Teen
I Want to Divorce My Teen

Video.summary: Sons and daughters feel that their mothers dress and act too sexy and they want them to change.
Video.title: Mom, Stop Embarrassing Me!

Video.summary: Dysfunctional families confront the root of the problem with Sally’s help on today’s heavily dramatic episode.
Video.title: Psycho Mother-in-law
